MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $955.85 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE MAR-20-2013, FILED BY PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND VICINITY ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF IRON WORKERS LOCAL UNION NO.377
ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD WITH COSTS
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-01-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL ENTER AN AWARD CONFIRMING THE AWARD IN THE AMOUNT OF $4619.20, AND REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1250.00, PER THE DECLARATION OF COUNSEL. PETITIONER DID NOT PROVIDE A PROPOSED ORDER WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS Granted. No opposition filed. The Court will enter an award confirming the award in the amount of $4619.20, and reasonable attorney fees in the amount of $1250.00, per the declaration of counsel. Petitioner did not provide a proposed Order with the moving papers. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award; Index
